body_txt: Are you hung over? Did you forget to drink water before bed? Do you wish to avoid the Hideous Hangover Cure ? All that is no problem, no problem at all: here's some of whatever it was you drank last night! Your hangover will be over in no time flat! A classic "remedy" for hangovers, this trope is somewhat Truth in Television insofar as it dulls your ability to feel the effects of the hangover. Of course, all it really does is delay the hangover by a couple of hours — "kicking the can down the road". The name of the trope derives from the (false) superstition that if you were bitten by a dog, you could avoid rabies by applying the hair of the dog that bit you to the wound.
